param.name: distance
param.comment: Trade distance (jumps) - legacy parameter, used as fallback

param.name: homeSector
param.comment: Home sector for path efficiency calculation

param.name: shipToBuyDistance
param.comment: Distance from ship to buy station (for path efficiency)

param.name: buyToSellDistance
param.comment: Distance from buy station to sell station

param.name: homeToBuyDistance
param.comment: Distance from home sector to buy station

param.name: homeToSellDistance
param.comment: Distance from home sector to sell station

do_if.value: $shipToBuyDistance ge 0 and $buyToSellDistance ge 0 and $homeToBuyDistance ge 0 and $homeToSellDistance ge 0 and $buySector? and $sellSector?

debug_text.text: '[GT-Efficiency] Multi-factor=' + $useMultiFactor + ', Ship Buy=' + $shipToBuyDistance + ', Buy Sell=' + $buyToSellDistance + ', Home Buy=' + $homeToBuyDistance + ', Home Sell=' + $homeToSellDistance

'[GT-Efficiency] Multi-factor penalties (multiplier=' + $distancePenaltyMultiplier + '): Ship Buy=' + $shipToBuyPenalty + ', Buy Sell=' + $buyToSellPenalty + ', Home=' + $homeDistancePenalty + ', Total=' + $adjustedDistance

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to get distance penalty for

param.name: parameters
param.comment: AI parameters table (must match structure from gt_trading_ai.xml)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Lock] (' + $ship.idcode + ') LOCK ACQUIRE FAILED - lock already exists (lockTime: ' + global.$GT_SearchLocks.{$ship} + ')'
'[GT-Lock] (' + $ship.idcode + ') LOCK ACQUIRED (lockTime: ' + player.age + ')'

param.name: traceId
param.value: if global.$GT_AIParameters? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{$ship}? and global.$GT_AIParameters.{$ship}.$TraceId? then global.$GT_AIParameters.{$ship}.$TraceId else ''

debug_text.text: '[GT-Lock] (' + $shipIdCode + ') LOCK RELEASED (reason: ' + $reason + ', lockTime: ' + $lockTime + ', age: ' + (player.age - $lockTime) + ')'

do_if.value: $shouldLog and global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Debug? and global.$GT_Config.$Debug.$TradeSearch? and @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging

set_value.name: $safeShipIdCode
set_value.exact: if ($logShipIdCode? and $logShipIdCode != null and $logShipIdCode != '') then $logShipIdCode else 'INVALID_SHIP'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Registry] AI parameters cleaned up for ' + $safeShipIdCode + ' (' + $reason + ', RequestTime: ' + $paramsRequestTime + ')'

do_if.value: $shouldLog and global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Debug? and global.$GT_Config.$Debug.$TradeSearch? and @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging

set_value.name: $safeShipIdCode2
set_value.exact: if ($logShipIdCode2? and $logShipIdCode2 != null and $logShipIdCode2 != '') then $logShipIdCode2 else 'INVALID_SHIP'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Registry] Skipping parameter cleanup for ' + $safeShipIdCode2 + ' - parameters belong to newer request (lock: ' + $lockTime + ', params: ' + $paramsRequestTime + ')'

do_if.value: $shouldLog and global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Debug? and global.$GT_Config.$Debug.$TradeSearch? and @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging

set_value.name: $safeShipIdCode3
set_value.exact: if ($logShipIdCode3? and $logShipIdCode3 != null and $logShipIdCode3 != '') then $logShipIdCode3 else 'INVALID_SHIP'

debug_text.text: '[GT-Registry] deep cleanup (' + $reason + '): reset live/batch state for ' + $safeShipIdCode3

param.name: shipCargoCapacity
param.comment: Ship's max cargo capacity (for scaling threshold)

param.name: configBaseProfit
param.comment: Base profit at Level 15 for reference cargo (RAW centicredits). Example: 100Cr = 10000.

param.name: minScore
param.comment: Minimum score required (default: 0 = any positive score)

param.name: offersList
param.comment: List of trade offers to index

param.name: offersList
param.comment: List of offers to sort and limit

param.name: maxCount
param.comment: Maximum number of offers to return

param.name: sortAscending
param.comment: If true, sort ascending (take first N), if false sort descending (take last N)

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship that would execute the trade

param.name: wareBasket
param.comment: Allowed ware basket (empty = all wares allowed)

param.name: filterStats
param.comment: Optional filter statistics table to update

param.name: isIntraSectorTrade
param.comment: Whether this is an intra-sector trade

set_value.name: $shouldLogIntraSector
set_value.exact: if $isolatedValue? and ($isolatedValue == true or $isolatedValue == 1) then true else false

debug_text.text:
'[GT-Resume] ' + $ship.idcode + ': ' + $tradeType + ' trade (' + $wareName + '):' + '
 Current sector: ' + $currentSectorName + ' (blacklisted: ' + $pathResult.$CurrentSectorIsBlacklisted + ')' + '
 Buy sector: ' + $buySectorName + ' (distance: ' + $pathResult.$BuyPathDistance + ', same as current: ' + ($buySector == $currentSector) + ')' + '
 Sell sector: ' + $sellSectorName + ' (distance: ' + $pathResult.$SellPathDistance + ', same as buy: ' + ($sellSector == $buySector) + ', same as current: ' + ($sellSector == $currentSector) + ')' + (if not $pathResult.$IsReachable then ' [PATH BLOCKED]' else '')

set_value.name: $wareName
set_value.exact: if $buyOffer? and $buyOffer.ware? then @$buyOffer.ware.name else (if $sellOffer? and $sellOffer.ware? then @$sellOffer.ware.name else 'NULL')

debug_text.text:
'[GT-CreateTrade] TRADE OBJECT CREATED:' + '
 Ware: ' + $wareName + '
 Buy Station: ' + $buyStationName + ' @ ' + ($buyPrice/100) + ' Cr (RAW: ' + $buyPrice + ')' + '
 Sell Station: ' + $sellStationName + ' @ ' + ($sellPrice/100) + ' Cr (RAW: ' + $sellPrice + ')' + '
 Amount: ' + $amount + ' units' + '
 Profit: ' + $profit + ' RAW (' + ($profit/100) + ' Cr)' + '
 Verification: (' + ($sellPrice/100) + ' - ' + ($buyPrice/100) + ') * ' + $amount + ' = ' + (($sellPrice - $buyPrice) * $amount / 100) + ' Cr'

param.name: failedTrades
param.comment: Nested table of failed trades: failedTrades.{buySector}.{sellSector}

param.name: tradesPerWare
param.comment: Table of trades per ware (may be null or invalid)

debug_text.text: '[GT-UI-DUE-TOTAL] Recalculated total RAW=' + $totalProjected + ' (' + ($totalProjected / 100) + ' Cr), entries=' + (if $shipKeys? then $shipKeys.count else 0)
'[GT-UI-DUE-SET] ' + $ship.idcode + ': projectedRaw=' + $projectedRaw + ' (' + ($projectedRaw / 100) + ' Cr)'

param.name: deltaRaw
param.comment: Amount to add in RAW centicredits

debug_text.text: '[GT-UI-DUE-CLEAR] ' + $shipId + ': removing projectedRaw=' + $oldProjectedRaw + ' (' + ($oldProjectedRaw / 100) + ' Cr)'

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to clear pending trade data for

do_if.value: not global.$GT_Reservations? or typeof global.$GT_Reservations != datatype.table

param.name: skillLevel
param.comment: Pilot skill level (for capping fallback distance)

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to check batch status for

param.name: tradesWithDistance
param.comment: List of trades with Distance field

param.name: wareTrades
param.comment: List of trades for a specific ware

param.name: isFallbackSearch
param.comment: Whether this is a fallback search

param.name: sortedTrades
param.comment: List of trades sorted by distance

param.name: isFallbackSearch
param.comment: Whether this is a fallback search

debug_text.text: '[GT-Resume] (' + $ship.idcode + ') EARLY EXIT for ware ' + @$ware.name + ': Reached distance limit (' + $distanceLimit + ' jumps from ' + $distanceType + ') at trade ' + $i + '/' + $sortedTrades.count + ' (skipped ' + $skippedDueToDistance + ' trades)'
'[GT Data] Registered new pilot: ' + $pilot.name + ' for ship ' + $ship.idcode
'[GT Data] Updated existing pilot: ' + $pilot.name + ' for ship ' + $ship.idcode

set_value.name: global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}
set_value.exact: table[ $Name = $ship.knownname, $IDCode = $ship.idcode, $RegistrationTime = player.age, $LastActiveTime = player.age, $IsSubordinate = false, $Commander = null, $FleetPosition = 0, $TotalTrades = 0, $TotalProfit = 0, $LastTradeTime = null ]

debug_text.text: '[GT Data] Registered new ship: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GT Data] Updated existing ship: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (' + $ship.idcode + ')'

set_value.name: global.$GT_GlobalSettings
set_value.exact: table[ $XP = table[ $AutoTraining = true, $BaseXPPerTrade = 25, $DistanceBonus = 20, $RiskBonus = 25 ], $Fleet = table[ $EnableFleetCoordination = true ], $Debug = table[ $DebugLevel = 1, $TradeEvaluation = false ] ]

debug_text.text: '[GT Data] Initialized ' + $systemsInitialized + ' global systems'
'[GT Data] Cleaned up data for pilot: ' + $pilot.name

do_if.value: $ship.exists and $ship.isoperational and global.$GT_ActiveTraderCount? and global.$GT_ActiveTraderCount gt 0

debug_text.text: '[GT Data] Cleaned up data for ship: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (' + $ship.idcode + ')'

param.name: ship
param.comment: Optional: Ship parameter (reserved for future use)

param.name: zone
param.comment: Optional: Zone context for illegal check

param.name: shipOwner
param.comment: Optional: Ship owner for license check

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship that would execute the trade

debug_text.text:
'[GT-CalcProfit] PROFIT CALCULATION:' + '
 buyPrice: ' + $buyPrice + ' RAW (' + ($buyPrice/100) + ' Cr)' + '
 sellPrice: ' + $sellPrice + ' RAW (' + ($sellPrice/100) + ' Cr)' + '
 amount: ' + $amount + ' units' + '
 revenue: ' + $revenue + ' RAW (' + ($revenue/100) + ' Cr)' + '
 cost: ' + $cost + ' RAW (' + ($cost/100) + ' Cr)' + '
 expenses: ' + $expenses + ' RAW (' + ($expenses/100) + ' Cr)' + '
 profit: ' + $calculatedProfit + ' RAW (' + ($calculatedProfit/100) + ' Cr)' + '
 Verification: (' + ($sellPrice/100) + ' - ' + ($buyPrice/100) + ') * ' + $amount + ' = ' + (($sellPrice - $buyPrice) * $amount / 100) + ' Cr'

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to get home sector for

debug_text.text: '[GT-ERROR] Home sector not found for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - defaultorder.$home is null and GT_AIParameters.$HomeBase is null! This should never happen. Returning null to prevent drift.'
'[GT-ERROR] Failed to extract home sector from homeBase for ' + $ship.idcode + ' - returning null to prevent drift!'

param.name: sector
param.comment: Sector to get name for (or null to use ship.sector)

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to get sector from if sector not provided

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to get ware basket for

param.name: basket
param.comment: Ware basket list to check against

debug_text.text: '[GT-Threat] Route analysis: Preferred path threatened (normal: %s, blacklist: %s) - heavy penalty applied'.[$normalDistance, $blacklistDistance]
'[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': Fleet coordination: delaying startup for ' + $startupDelay + 's (found ' + $activeTraders + ' active traders, cached)'
'[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': Fleet coordination gated by level (requires 12), current=' + (if @$skillInfo.$Level != null then @$skillInfo.$Level else 1)
'[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': === CONFIGURATION SUMMARY ==='
'[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': Illegal=' + $config.$AllowIllegal + ', DistancePenalty=' + $config.$DistancePenalty + '%'
'[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': AutoTraining=' + $config.$AutoTraining + ', Fleet=' + $config.$FleetCoordination
'[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': Distance limits: MaxBuy=' + $config.$MaxBuyDistance + ' jumps, MaxSell=' + $config.$MaxSellDistance + ' jumps'
'[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': Ware basket: ' + $config.$WareBasket.count + ' wares configured (AutoWares=' + $config.$AutoWares + ')'
'[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': Skill Level=' + $config.$SkillInfo.$Level + ', Using MD System=' + $config.$SkillInfo.$UsingMDSystem
'[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': Clearing stale predictive training flag'
'[GT-AI] ' + $ship.idcode + ': Clearing stale training-in-progress flag (older than 5 minutes)'

param.name: number
param.comment: Number to format (in credits, not RAW format)

set_value.name: $gate
set_value.exact: table[ $MustTrainNow = false, $CanTrade = true, $XPGainBlocked = false, $XPBlocked = false, $BlockedLevel = 0, $HardForce = true, $Reason = 'none' ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-XP-Guard] Explorer exemption applied for pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' on ship ' + (if $ship? and $ship.exists then $ship.idcode else 'UNKNOWN')

param.name: maxFailureRows
param.comment: Max rejected stations to list as samples

do_if.value: $ship.pilot and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.pilot}.$Level?

append_to_list.name: $rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Training search summary', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Candidates=' + $candidateCount + ', max jumps=' + $maxJumps + ' (GT level ' + $pilotSkill + '). Filters match auto-training: reachable, path distance, blacklist, dock bay, docking permission, ValidStationTypes macro.' ]

append_to_list.name: $rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Training stations', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'Ship or sector invalid; cannot evaluate path.']

append_to_list.name: $rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Training stations', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'find_station returned 0 trading posts (player trade knowledge, relations, or filters).']

set_value.name: $failReason
set_value.exact: 'No docking bay for ship dock size ' + $ship.docksize

set_value.name: $failReason
set_value.exact: 'Macro not in ValidStationTypes (training will not start on dock)'

append_to_list.name: $rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Eligible stations', $Status = 'WARN', $Detail = 'None within max jumps passing all checks.']

append_to_list.name: $rows
append_to_list.exact: table[$Check = 'Eligible stations', $Status = 'PASS', $Detail = 'Count: ' + $eligibleCount + ' (auto-training picks nearest by path distance).']

append_to_list.name: $rows
append_to_list.exact: table[ $Check = 'Rejected (sample)', $Status = 'INFO', $Detail = 'Showing up to ' + $maxFailureRows + ' of ' + $failureCount + ' rejected candidates.' ]

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to check logbook setting for

param.name: Message
param.comment: Message string (REQUIRED - construct using {77000,ID}.[params] before calling)

param.name: Category
param.comment: Logbook category: alerts, upkeep, news, general, tips

param.name: Object
param.comment: Object to attach message to (ship, station, etc.)

param.name: Money
param.comment: Money amount to display (negative for expenses, positive for income)

param.name: CheckGlobalSettings
param.comment: Check global logbook settings before writing (default true)

debug_text.text: '[GT-Logbook] WriteLogbookMessage: Category=' + $Category + ', Title=' + $Title
'[GT-Logbook] Message exists=' + $msgExists + ', null=' + $msgNull + ', empty=' + $msgEmpty

param.name: counterPath
param.comment: Path to counter (legacy helper; dynamic access unsupported in MD)

param.name: initializeIfMissing
param.comment: Initialize counter to 0 if it doesn't exist

param.name: clampToZero
param.comment: Clamp counter to 0 if it goes negative

param.name: key
param.comment: Unique key for this work item (typically ship.idcode + '_' + type)

param.name: traceId
param.comment: Trace ID for this work item

debug_text.text: '[GT-ERROR] GT_CreateWorkItem: type or key is empty - type=' + $type + ' key=' + $key

set_value.name: global.$GT_Scheduler
set_value.exact: table[ $WorkQueue = [], $ActiveWork = table[], $Budgets = table[ $CheapOpsPerTick = 10, $OfferOpsPerTick = 5, $MatchOpsPerTick = 1, $MaxActiveHomeSearches = 1, $MaxActiveFallbackSearches = $defaultFallbackSearches ], $Counters = table[ $Queued = 0, $Active = 0, $Completed = 0, $Failed = 0 ], $Processing = false, $LastStatsLog = player.age ]

debug_text.text: '[GT-WARN] GT_EnqueueWorkItem: Scheduler auto-initialized (should have been initialized by SystemInit)'
'[GT-ERROR] GT_EnqueueWorkItem: Work item is null or missing required fields'

param.name: workItem
param.comment: Work item object (optional - if provided, skips lookup)

debug_text.text: '[GT-ERROR] GT_UpdateWorkItemState: Scheduler not initialized - key=' + $key
'[GT-ERROR] GT_UpdateWorkItemState: Work item not found - key=' + $key
'[GT-ERROR] GT_UpdateWorkItemState: Work item is null - key=' + $key

set_value.name: $logTraceId
set_value.exact: if $traceId != '' then $traceId else (if $workItem? and $workItem.$TraceId? then $workItem.$TraceId else '0')

param.name: payload
param.comment: Work item payload containing search parameters
